agents.name: Internal Science Lead
agents.why: owns the moat hypothesis (the #N starting ranks)

agents.name: Q-Models Runner
agents.why: quantify binding / selectivity / ADMET on the surfaced candidate

agents.name: FDA Institutional Memory ⛔
agents.why: dispositive-veto check on the class (prior CRL/withdrawal)

panel.persona: Dr. Catherine Brennan, Third Rock Ventures

panel.why: institutional — must stay adversarial; stress every claim

facts.value: RHEB — small GTPase directly downstream of TSC2; activates mTORC1. Modality TBD (small molecule vs ASO/degrader).
Moat ranked RHEB #7 (subtle GTPase functional signature) despite near-perfect mechanistic coupling.
2nd most common somatic cause of FCD IIb; PPI-to-mTOR 0.999.
Boltz-2 pKd 5.4, prob_binder 0.41 (weak); ATOMICA dock -6.1, shallow solvent-exposed pose — no deep pocket.
ADMET-AI: clean tox (low DILI/hERG), BBB borderline — moot until ligandability solved.
PPARD CRITICAL — GW501516 multi-species carcinogenicity, FDA/EMA holds — removed.
MTOR = everolimus incumbent: WARNING immunosuppression/growth impairment, 50,182 FAERS (PMID 31335226) — set aside, not a discovery.
RHEB MONITOR-class, no clinical inhibitor (safety inferred); small-molecule ligandability hard -> ASO/degrader. DEPDC5 (best Mendelian genetics) abstained — intractable GATOR1 reactivation.

synthesis.recommendation: Pursue RHEB as a genetic-medicine (ASO / degrader) platform bet on the TSC2–mTOR axis — a research commitment, not a small-molecule program.
synthesis.consensus: Unanimous: RHEB biology is right (node-specific downstream of TSC2, PPI 0.999, 2nd somatic FCD cause) and could spare everolimus's pan-mTOR paediatric liabilities.
synthesis.dissent: Low divergence. Conviction 4 (Denali — sees direct BBB-platform fit) vs 3 (BioMarin, Third Rock, Takeda — gate on modality + paediatric safety). No champion, no veto.
synthesis.convergent_gate: All four independently reframed the target: small-molecule ligandability is the blocker (Boltz-2 pKd 5.4, shallow pocket) → the modality must be ASO/degrader, and CNS delivery + paediatric chronic safety are the real gates.
synthesis.proposed_experiment: Show RHEB knockdown/degradation normalizes the oEP excitability phenotype the moat under-resolved, with a node-specific safety margin vs pan-mTOR and a credible CNS-delivery (BBB) plan for the chosen modality.
synthesis.confidence: Biology: HIGH. Modality / feasibility: CONDITIONAL — reframed from inhibitor to genetic medicine.
open_items: RHEB MONITOR-class, no clinical inhibitor (safety inferred); small-molecule ligandability hard -> ASO/degrader. DEPDC5 (best Mendelian genetics) abstained — intractable GATOR1 reactivation.
